[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows two cats sitting close together indoors, with white and gray-green eye reflections, and two rounded text labels overlaid on the image.

The main focus is two cats in the foreground: one cat on the left has white fur with light gray shading and an ear visible, while the other cat on the right has a gray-brown and white face with large green eyes and pointed ears. Both cats are positioned facing the camera, their heads close together, and their eyes appear wide and alert.

Setting: The background is indoors and out of focus, with dark and muted tones behind the cats. Lighting is soft and even, likely from the front, highlighting the cats’ faces.

Visual Details: The image is a tight crop with the cats filling most of the frame. The left cat’s fur appears fluffy and slightly blurred, while the right cat’s fur shows clearer color separation between gray-brown and white patches. Two white rounded rectangles with bold black text are placed near the top: one over the left cat area and one over the right cat area.

Visible Text: parisa; ja

Practical Summary: The image shows two cats, one white and one gray-and-white, sitting closely and looking toward the camera. Overlay text labels read “parisa” and “ja.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

parisa  
jia

# Structured Version

- parisa  
- jia

# Notes

No unclear text detected.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
